name: NRG Energy, Inc.
description: NRG Energy, Inc. is a leading North American energy and home services company headquartered in Houston, Texas. The company specializes in the production, sale, and distribution of energy, serving residential, commercial, industrial, and wholesale customers across the United States and Canada. Through a diverse portfolio of brands, including Reliant, Direct Energy, Green Mountain Energy, and Vivint, NRG provides integrated solutions designed to help customers power, protect, and intelligently manage their homes and businesses. Founded in 1989, the company operates through various segments, focusing on delivering reliable energy services and innovative smart home technologies.
